CustomField.description: State of the Claude-driven triage summary for this Lead. Blank = not yet processed. Generated = summary ready. Failed = Claude API error, see AI Integration Logs. Skipped = Lead missing required inputs (Job_Title__c / Region__c).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Blank means not yet processed. If Failed, contact the admin with this Lead Id so they can review the AI Integration Logs.
CustomField.label: AI Status
